headline: Analysts Optimistic About Parker-Hannifin (PH) Prospects
summary: Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy Before SpaceX IPO. On April 13, Citi raised its target price on Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) shares from $1,092 to $1,137 while maintaining a Buy rating. The update came after the firm revised its expectations for the first quarter. Industry trends are improving steadily, […]
